skills.name: Piercing Shot
skills.description: Fire a bullet that penetrates the enemy in front.
skills.effect_text:
Discover more
Doll
Maps
Handbags & Purses
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Block Penetration 100% added

skills.name: Tracking
skills.description: Apply [Tracking] debuff to the target. Final Damage and Minimum Critical Rate of Tiger Hunter skills dealt with the target under debuff increases.
skills.effect_text:
Debuff Duration: 60 seconds
Final Damage of Tiger Hunter increases by CaptionRatio %
Minimum Critical Rate increases by CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Rapid Shot
skills.description: Give damage to the target by continuous shooting.

skills.name: Tiger Hunting
skills.description: {#005060}Activates when there is a target under [Tracking] debuff you applied
skills.effect_text:
Casting time 4 seconds
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 10 times

skills.name: Camo Shot
skills.description: Grants a Conceal buff that hides you from the enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Buff removed by CaptionRatio % chance when using attack skill
Buff Duration: CaptionTime seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Tiger Hunting: Commando
attributes.description:
* Casting time of [Tiger Hunting] changed to 6 seconds

* Resist to all debuff that requires advanced removal during [Tiger Hunting]

* Immune to Knockback and Knockdown while casting [Tiger Hunting]

* Cooldown of [Tiger Hunting] is reset when defeating an enemy character with [Tiger Hunting]
